prediction.reasoning: Used historical volatility analysis for IBM stock, assuming annualized volatility of ~25% based on typical large-cap tech stocks. Applied geometric Brownian motion model with 2-day horizon, scaling daily volatility (~1.57%) by sqrt(2). Point estimate assumes no drift over short 2-day period. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty ranges: 50% CI spans ~±1.1%, 80% CI spans ~±2.2%, and 90% CI spans ~±3.0% from current price.
